O jogo foi lançado no dia 19 de junho de 2025 e, até hoje, 25 de agosto, continua sem recursos básicos que deveriam ser obrigatórios em qualquer título online. O mais gritante é a ausência de um sistema de denúncia   e a inexistência de um matchmaking decente. Essa combinação destrói completamente qualquer possibilidade de competitividade justa. Um jogo online, em pleno 2025, ser lançado sem um sistema mínimo de denúncia é simplesmente inaceitável e beira o desrespeito com os jogadores. O resultado é um ambiente totalmente permissivo, onde jogadores tóxicos ou trapaceiros podem atrapalhar partidas inteiras sem correr o risco de sofrer qualquer tipo de consequência.

Além disso, a parte técnica também deixa muito a desejar. Mecânicas que deveriam ser fundamentais para a jogabilidade, como interceptação, chute, bloqueio e defesa, não funcionam de forma consistente. Na prática, tudo parece ocorrer de forma aleatória ou “inconsciente”, sem critério claro. Há situações em que a bola simplesmente teleporta de um ponto a outro, ou até mesmo atravessa o chão, quebrando completamente o ritmo da partida, destruindo o desenvolvimento da jogada e frustrando qualquer tentativa de estratégia. O pior é quando o sistema parece escolher a dedo quem terá prioridade em disputas: se o atacante chutando a bola ou o defensor tentando bloqueá-la. Essa falta de clareza nos critérios gera uma experiência inconsistente, que mina a sensação de justiça e skill dentro do jogo.

E enquanto a comunidade pede ajustes básicos e melhorias urgentes, os desenvolvedores parecem mais preocupados em firmar parcerias comerciais irrelevantes, como a recente com a PUMA, do que em corrigir os erros que realmente impactam a experiência dos jogadores. Isso dá a clara impressão de que o foco está mais em monetização e marketing do que em entregar um produto estável, divertido e competitivo.

Atualmente, é impossível recomendar o jogo. O que foi entregue aos jogadores não passa de um beta disfarçado de produto final, vendido por R$89, sem conteúdo real e com falhas estruturais gritantes. Talvez, quando o hype cair e o jogo começar a ser esquecido, a empresa se mova para corrigir esses problemas e entregar algo realmente digno do preço cobrado. Mas até lá, a sensação é de que os jogadores pagaram caro para servir de testadores de luxo de um jogo inacabado.

Almost 200 hours of gameplay
Climbed to Elite Rank
Got all the achievements

Still uninstalled the game and here's why you shouldn't waste your time with this game:

SERVERS:
Netcode in this game is just terribly bad, so tackles and ball priority sometimes don't work well enough.

MATCHMAKING:
This is by far the worst ranked matchmaking system I've seen. If you manage to climb your way to Elite, you will still end up playing with Bronze, Silver, Gold ranks, while the other team can still be a 5-man party ELITE team.

BALL PRIORITY:
Shots always have priorities, so right now the meta is just people passing the ball from accross the field to someone standing near the box that always gets the priority to shoot in the goal, and that's basically it. Yeah, this is basically Elite gameplay in a nutshell.

BUGGED MECHANICS EXPLOITS:
Right now the game's allowing people to bug animations to make up new dribbles which are just impossible to do anything about it as a defender. For example, people just bug out the camera to do a rainbow flick in a direction while their character is doing the animation in another direction, and this is just one of many examples.

CROSSPLAY:
Game doesn't even have crossplay between PC platforms, it's just amazing how they released this game without even doing that. I know they plan to release it by September, but it should have been there from the start.

Core gameplay is amazing, but the game is just a pile of problems that the devs are taking their sweet time to solve them, so don't buy it right now, maybe after some months they might fix things, maybe not.

I have no clue how someone can give this game a positive review. This developer had a chance to turn this into gold, if only they were not lazy and greedy.

The game is a buggy mess, where nothing makes sense with how the ball is acting. You lose games because the ball just flies through goalkeepers, players can teleport 10 meters towards the ball just because they pressed some magic button. There is some actual magic stuff happening where the ball just follows players who are standing 5 meters away from the ball and teleports back into their foot even if you performed a perfect tackle on them with sounds and animations indicating that you did. So, basically ball handling is clumsy, and animations are wooden and often confusing. And all those issues are present from the betas. And none of them are getting fixed. Yet, the store gets updated frequently without any issues. It just shows you where this developer's mind is with this game. Just to make as much money as they can while hype is high. Then turn it free to play after, like, a year or two, after most people will get tired of this broken mess.

And again, the one who complains about some toxic players. It all can be fixed by you just finding friends to play with. But that's not what is most frustrating about this game. What's frustrating is that this game is a broken mess, and nothing seems to be fixed. If you wish to give this game a try, just wait till it goes free to play eventually.

PS. Also, the PvP multiplayer game lacks any report or blacklist systems. So pretty much trolling and leaving is tolerated by this developer as well.

ソロでエリートの1500まで上げました。このゲームの面白いところはイーフトやFIFAと違い、選手の動きがAIによって制御されないためすべて実力で納得できるところ、エフェクトなどがない。そしてとにかくモーションがかっこいいのとパスやゴールをうまく出来たときの快感がえぐい。このゲームの改善点はマッチングが遅い、これは人口自体が多くないのでしょうがない。通報機能などがない。そのせいで味方にトロールが来た際に何も手段がない。そして勝っても負けても一律で20下がるのはいいと思う。なぜなら負けが確定した場面でパス回しをして少しでも下がるのを少なくしようという人が出てきてしまうため、あとはシンプルに挙動がおかしい場面がある、キーパーが正面のボールを止めなかったりなどがある。あとは開幕ゴールキーパーからＣＦフライパスを出されたときに前にいても後ろにいても取れないときがあるのでもう少しディフェンス有利にしてほしいと思った。例えばハーフラインより手前からのパスシュートはディフェンス側が有利に障れるようになったりなど、あとは味方のバックパスをゴールキーパーが拾えるのはやめたほうがいいと思います。せっかくのスピーディーな試合展開がこれによって阻害されています。

O jogo tem um potencial absurdo, mas já se passaram semanas desde o lançamento e nenhuma atualização relevante ou correção de bugs foi feita. Em um jogo onde timing e coordenação são essenciais, não existe um sistema de comunicação decente. O chat de voz é ruim. Vamos ser sinceros, ninguém quer ficar ouvindo um brasileiro ou argentino reclamando no ouvido o tempo todo. O jogo precisa urgentemente de um sistema de ping, comandos rápidos ou falas pré-gravadas. No estado atual, tudo que dá pra fazer é ficar gritando "toca!" e torcer pra alguém ouvir.

Além disso, o jogo enfrenta problemas sérios de conexão. Mesmo com o ping estável, a bola teleporta, o goleiro puxa a bola magicamente, e o rollback arranca a bola do seu pé o tempo inteiro. Se acontecesse uma vez a cada dez partidas, tudo bem. Mas acontece várias vezes em praticamente toda partida. É frustrante e cansativo.

O jogo é extremamente divertido, especialmente com amigos. Jogar uma "pelada" com a galera é sempre divertido. Mas com essa quantidade de bugs e a empresa só lançando DLC de skin que ninguém pediu, fica muito difícil de apoiar.

The game has insane potential, but it's been weeks since launch and there have been no meaningful updates or bug fixes. In a game where timing and coordination are crucial, there's no proper communication system. The voice chat is terrible. Let's be honest, no one wants to hear a random Brazilian or Argentinian complaining in their ear. The game really needs a proper ping system, quick commands, or pre-recorded voice lines. Right now, all you can do is shout "pass it!" and hope someone listens.

On top of that, the game is facing serious connection issues. Even with a good ping, the ball teleports, the goalkeeper magically grabs it, and rollback keeps snatching it from your feet. If this happened once every ten matches, that would be fine. But it happens multiple times per match, almost constantly. It’s frustrating and exhausting.

The game is extremely fun, especially with friends. Playing a casual match with your crew is always a good time. But with this many bugs, and the devs only releasing pointless skin DLCs nobody asked for, it’s getting really hard to support.

As cool as the core gameplay is, this game needed another year in development. Almost every aspect of the game feels unfinished/lacking/broken.

[list]
    [*]Awful netcode - Players are teleporting regularly and the ball changes its mind after you thought you knocked it away. Goalkeepers also occasionally catch the ball and then still concede a goal.
    [*]Nonsensical ranked system - Regardless of your rank, you will get paired with and against players of any rank. You can be in diamond and play with silver players or in bronze and face master rank players.
    [*]No solo/stack queues - You can solo queue and face 5-man premade teams.
    [*]Mechanical issues - There's already been a ton of exploits. Devs have been addressing and fixing them, but there's still new ones being found.
    [*]Ball priority - Shots beat basically everything. Playing defense feels really bad when you're in situations where you logically should have the advantage but the guy winding up his kick mid-air behind you will make the ball phase through you.
    [*]Broken customization - Some colors aren't working and there's no actual way to unlock player titles as of now despite them being visible in the game
    [*]Daily missions - There is only one mission and that's it. It repeats every day.
    [*]Broken menus - Can't show the scoreboard at the times when it makes most sense (during replays and after goals) and the post-match screens are split into tabs but when you switch to one it keeps resetting to the first.
    [*]Minimal soundtrack - There's a dynamic soundtrack in place which is meant to highlight intense moments like overtime attacks, but for most of the match you barely notice anything playing. It's more like ambient sounds.
    [*]Poor battlepass progression - It's split into three phases which unlock at different dates throughout the seasons, a couple weeks apart. However, leveling up gets you the points which you use to unlock rewards and you can keep earning those after completing the current phase. That means by the time the next one starts, you may have enough points to unlock everything instantly and then have to wait another few weeks before you get anything else.
[/list]

The game is fun and unique, but all of the issues I listed above ruin the experience.

Really fun game, with some very serious community concerns that keep me from recommending the game at this time. 

First and foremost, there are known speedhacks being used in competitive online matchmaking that Easy Anti Cheat clearly has no ability to prevent. Relatively few players are aware of this because you will typically only start encountering them at higher competitive ranks, but a quick google search can find piles of videos. This alone is bad enough, but they launched the game out of beta with this known exploit without any in-game reporting system. At the time I am writing this if you want to report a cheater you need to (1) capture video evidence of them cheating, (2) navigate to their steam profile after the game and screenshot their user ID, (3) join the official Rematch discord channel, (4) report them through that discord channel, (5) hope something is done about that one single cheater, but don't expect any confirmation one way or the other. Even if there weren't known game-breaking speedhackers spoiling high ranked games, the lack of reporting system creates a ton of frustration for players from toxic teammates sabotaging gameplay. 

There are some other issues with the game that I personally don't find especially concerning (launching without crossplay, networking problems). For me, the combination of cheaters, no in-game reporting system, and effectively pointless anticheat software have killed the fun of an otherwise exciting game. Sloclap should have addressed all of this in the extended beta. The fact that they didn't is a major red flag for me. 

Hopefully these issues are addressed in the near future so I can get back to gaming and I can update this review to the recommendation the game deserves.

This game is amazing with friends so i hope cross play comes out quickly. REMATCH: Frustrante y poco pulido

REMATCH una de las experiencias más frustrantes que he tenido en un videojuego reciente.

🎮 Jugabilidad y controles
- Los controles son rígidos y no se pueden remapear, lo que limita la accesibilidad.
- El sistema de apuntado es impreciso y poco intuitivo, antinatural hasta para los pulgares.
- El salto asignado al botón Triángulo/Y resulta incómodo y poco funcional.
- Input lag considerable, lo que afecta la respuesta del personaje.


🌐 Rendimiento y servidores
- Las animaciones están desfasadas respecto a las acciones del jugador.
- El juego sufre de un lag constante, incluso en servidores con baja latencia (60ms).
- Los servidores son inestables, con partidas que superan los 180ms de ping, generando retrocesos y una experiencia antinatural.

🛍️ Contenido y monetización
- El juego carece de contenido significativo desde el lanzamiento.
- Da la impresión de que se recortó contenido intencionalmente para venderlo en la tienda.
- El sistema de progresión es pobre y no recompensa al jugador.

⚙️ Personalización y modos de juego
- Las opciones de personalización son limitadas.
- Hay pocas modalidades de juego disponibles.
- El modo competitivo (ranked) carece de incentivos reales.
- Además, ya se han detectado casos de trampas (cheaters), lo que agrava la experiencia.

REMATCH es un producto lanzado de forma apresurada, sin el pulido necesario y con un enfoque excesivo en la monetización. Es preocupante cómo este tipo de prácticas se están normalizando en la industria y que obtenga un 76% de aceptación positiva.

adoro sifu y se que sloclap puede hacer un mejor trabajo, pero por favor el estado de los servers es insufrible, no puede ser que tenga que usar un vpn a brazil para arreglarlo, y aun asi esta la chance que vuelva a tener lag, ni si quiera pido que agreguen mas servers, pero el enrutamiento es una verga, como que para conectarte a un server de brazil el 90% de las veces te manda a UNO DE ESTADOS UNIDOS y despues al server de brazil????? parece que quisieron hacer el sistema que tiene Valve con el enrutamiento pero les salio para el carajo, haces eso cuando tenes varios servidores en varias zonas, no solo en brazil. 

se que los ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ se andan quejando de otros problemas, como por ejemplo los bugs, cheaters (no me encontre ninguno personalmente) y el netplay, que esto SI es una verga, el juego esta bueno pero a no ser que quieran el pase o practicar o alguna tonteria asi, por favor comprenlo cuando llegue la actualizacion del crossplay (que no tiene aun por cierto) o directamente la temporada 1 del pase

enrutamiento, o directamente servidores en argentina o chile (que usen AWS por favor.)

Review for Rematch – Peak Rank: Master 1
⭐️ 7/10

I’ve sunk a lot of hours into Rematch with friends since launch, and while it’s an incredibly addictive game with a genuinely fun core gameplay loop, I can’t in good faith recommend it in its current state.

This doesn’t feel like a finished product. It feels like early access or a beta dressed up as a £20.99 release with esports aspirations. Here’s why:

    ❌ Horrible netcode and desync – The exact same situation with the exact same inputs could play out 10 times, and I can almost guarantee every outcome would be different. That level of inconsistency completely undermines a fast-paced game that’s supposed to reward skill and teamwork.

    ❌ No in-game reporting – Trying to report a player boots you out to Steam, and even then most players recommend using Discord. Why should I need to rely on a separate communications app just to report bad behaviour in a competitive game?

    ❌ No cross-play – In 2025, this feels like a glaring omission for any multiplayer title. Now, it is *coming*, so keep an eye out for that, but it isn't here yet.

    ❌ Low-quality skins – Premium cosmetics feel rushed and uninspired. The premium skins need something that makes them stand out a bit from the base cosmetics.

And yet, when Rematch works—when you pull off a clutch team play or coordinate perfectly with friends—it’s phenomenal. The skill expression is there. The foundation is solid. But it feels like you’re battling the game itself to enjoy it.

It’s unacceptable for a team-based, competitive-focused game to release in this state. At £20.99, I expect release-ready, not hope-for-future-patches.

⚠️ Verdict: Do not buy in its current state. Wait for fixes, netcode improvements, and basic competitive features like proper reporting before diving in. There’s a bright future here—but right now, it’s buried under bugs, technical issues, and baffling design choices.

There are many things to say at this stage in the game, but I will try to summarize my impressions after more than 40h and a Platinum rank. I actually like the game, but there are too many things to be improved, and I hope that devs sometimes check the reviews, especially the negative one, and can take some feedbacks from that.

Since the beta I had some doubts, but after months, there are important things to be added and modified:

[*] First of all, should be added a report button or "avoid as teammate", asap. Too many trolls or people going suddenly afk, maybe while in the keeper role. Losing like this is a huge pain.

[*] Fix the servers: the quality is bad, there are a lot of lag issues, and for a game non free-to-play is not acceptable. Ball freezes, and so many times it seems it passed a player or the keeper, while is in control of them instead. (In game and spectating).

[*] Show the levels of the players (at the moment is completely useless) and maybe use it for the matchmaking. For sure would not guarantee an equal power in the teams, but can be useful.

[*] Moving now to more serious gameplay issues: the priority has to be fixed, updated, changed, completely reworked. It is completely unbalanced, and especially in high tiers, crossing is a gamble.

[*] The hippy slide can be read and defend against (sort of) but teleporting golden boost is still too unbalanced.
Every once in a while, a new trick comes out, and still makes me realize that this is not a game about football, but some kind of arcade game in which you have to use combinations and memorize tricks to be better than the others. And at this point, sorry, I would just play Mortal Kombat.

[*] The goalkeeper should be completely reworked. Is unbalanced in a crazy way, some of the worst things in the same. Is too easy to pass from the craziest save against 2 strikers and keeping the ball after a metheorite set to the top corner of the goal, to take the stupid, to the more stupid goal even jumping correctly.
At this point: consider an IA keeper option, or completely rework the movements. Take example from any soccer game released in the last 15 years.

[*] The physic in game is broken. The tackles sometimes reach to an exagerated distance/hitbox, sometimes they fail miserably even if 2 players are sliding. (And often I win the rebound like this myself).

[*] Add the replay function at the end of the game: this way, people can see the actions, save the goals, watch again the highlights. (Every Fifa has it, even is a bad comparizon, and If I am not mistaken even Rocket League).

[*] Add a preview of the shirt of the opponent, so I can choose which one to wear without using my eyesight.

[*] Rating a player or thanks someone at the end of the match would be a nice add too. I am ok without a text message chat or I would be banned from the planet soon.

[*] Stop adding stupid packs and give the player more enjoyable challenges: nobody wants a Ter Stegen or Kobbie Mainoo bundle. Add more titles for free, and ways to earn them playing.

[*] This would be an amazing challenge for your users, and a nice way to show up with the other players. (Like, score xxx goals, provide xxx assists, xxx saves...) or provide special skins with results like the change of tier ecc.

[*] Eventually, but this would completely change the game, and I don't think is gonna happen, could be evaluated the chance of adding skill points to change the gameplay.

[*] Little plus, the chance of customizations of the buttons would be nice for anyone playing a soccer game before, and adding some extra functions for the shoot or the dribbling could give more variety (power shot, bending shot and lob are already in the game, but completely manual and often random).

[*] Add extra dialogue in the game: there are so many things that can be added: "Man on", "Pass to the keeper" "In the middle" "Use the wall" and absolutely "UNLUCKY" and "Get back" or "Defence". Optional but nice, "what a save", you are marked" and so on and on. I would love a "pass the f***g ball, but let's keep it polite.

[*] Add extra points for special activities in the match, like a "perfect" tackle, miracle in the goal, aerobic goals, an incredible pass or whatever. Would be nice, you have only goal, pass, save, interception and assist, kinda basic.


[*] Add football shoes, and more nice accessories related to football. Despite the majority of the gamers putting white/black skin and the most horrific characters ever generated, would be nice a decent collab with the brands not only to take our money, but to actually add valuable items.

Any football game can teach you how to give a nice customization.


Summarizing: the game is fun WITH FRIENDS or sometimes you can play with. Communication really changes the gameplay. Rematch is a football game but is not about football. If you love this sport, can forget the purchase and move on without regrets until is updated and improved.

Is it bad? No, despite my review, I really think it has a huge potentials. If the devs accept to work on it, could be really a crack, otherwise, I easily see in the future as free to play, with 3 battlepass, and slowing agonizing till death.

Core gameplay is fun, however it lacks alot in polish and basic features.

There is zero social features (can't add people in-game, can't text chat, can't block toxic players, can't even REMATCH with same teams), no push-to-talk etc.

There is still quite a lot of bugs and glitches (Ball sometimes glitching out, replays glitching out, player models disappearing, audio glitches)

There is only 5 v 5 ranked mode at the moment and it is genuine hell to solo-queue, and even if I play with three other friends and have one random, that random can sabotage our game with own-goals with no repercussions at all. Griefing is a huge issue in both unranked and ranked games.
I'm also not sure if matchmaking is working properly at all - as a Gold Div 1, i'm still getting put into games with Bronze Div players, or just completely new players.

There needs to be more inbuilt comms options such as letting teammates know you want to rotate out keepers. There should be a way to communicate to your teammates that you want to be keeper or midfielder or cherry picking up the field. (no one uses voice chat because everyone has that disabled due to the bad open mic config)

Goalkeeping also seems to be kind of inconsistent as well, (im not sure if its purposely done this way) but sometimes you catch the ball or grab it out of the air just fine, and sometimes it just bounces off you or even bounces THROUGH you into the goal.

С нормальным пати в дискорде каждый матч это как симфония, но игра с рандомами - это мучение похлеще доты 2. Я очень не хочу что бы из-за "детских проблем" присущих всем онлайн-играм конкретно эта игра умерла. Пожалуйста, пофиксите, это экстремально просто. Рекомендую ли я? Однозначно. Стоит ли над ней работать напильником? Тем более однозначно.

[h2][b]Rematch, fútbol arcade con sabor a Rocket League[/b][/h2]

El fútbol en Argentina atraviesa la vida cotidiana de millones. Se juega, se ve, se siente. Sea en una cancha de barrio, en la tribuna o con un joystick en mano. Y siendo los actuales campeones del mundo y del continente, está claro que esto no es un juego: el fútbol es pasión, alegría y tristeza en partes iguales.

Como grandes consumidores de videojuegos de fútbol, sabemos que el mercado está casi monopolizado por EA Sports FC, seguido desde lejos por eFootball. Las propuestas más arcade (como Golazo!) o de gestión existen, pero orbitan sin hacer demasiado ruido internacional. Y ahí es donde aparece Rematch, el nuevo juego del estudio francés Sloclap, los mismos de Sifu, que se planta con una idea original y, sobre todo, divertida.

Uno de los mayores aciertos de Rematch está en sus controles, que rompen con todo lo conocido en juegos de fútbol. Acá no sirven los reflejos de FIFA ni las costumbres de PES. Por eso es clave hacer el tutorial, especialmente si venís con el chip clásico.

Como buen juego online recién salido del horno, Rematch tiene algunos problemas técnicos. En varias partidas sufrí caídas de conexión, lag y tirones en las animaciones.

También se siente la falta de un modo offline con bots, algo fundamental para practicar sin tener que pasar siempre por el matchmaking. Y aunque la personalización de personajes existe, es limitada, y desbloquear nuevos cosméticos puede resultar engorroso. Lo positivo: son solo elementos estéticos y no alteran la jugabilidad.

[b]Lee nuestro análisis completo en: [url=https://pressover.news/analisis/rematch-futbol-arcade-con-sabor-a-rocket-league/]Press Over News[/url][/b]

[strike]REMATCH es prácticamente injugable en este estado. En 3 de cada 5 partidas, me conecta a servidores con 160ms de ping, mientras que los del equipo rival (todos brasileros obviamente) parecen tener el servidor en el living de su casa, con 1ms. Sumado a eso, los compañeros que me tocan tienen el síndrome de Blue Lock, no te dan un pase ni de casualidad. Además, el matchmaking es un desastre total; estoy en Platino y me emparejan constantemente con jugadores de Bronce o Plata que no tienen idea de cómo jugar. 
La idea del juego es increíble, pero está optimizado tan mal que termina siendo un sufrimiento constante.[/strike]

Tras la salida del Patch 4, y la introducción de Network Next, los problemas de latencia se solucionaron. Además, agregaron crossplay y mejoraron ampliamente la jugabilidad. El juego sigue lleno de malos compañeros y el emparejamiento sigue siendo medio extraño, pero se nota que le están poniendo empeño al juego y ahora está mucho mas jugable.

Pros: Divertido si jugas con un grupo de amigos, no se lo recomiendo a nadie que piense jugarlo solo

Contras: Malos servidores, Mala optimizacion, Jugar con randoms es igual de divertido que jugar a la ruleta rusa con toda la munición en el cargador, No hay crossplay, No hay forma de reportar jugadores, No hay forma de reportar hackers, por lo poco que ofrecen deberia ser F2P, el matchmaking es horrible, es capaz de emparejar 5 personas en grupo contra 5 personas en solitario, etc

UPDATE 25/08/2025

Desde mi ultima reseña, lo unico que parece haberse solucionado es el tema de hackers, he visto varios perfiles con baneo de juego. Dicho esto, en America del Sur los servidores siguen siendo horribles, 160 de ping promedio.  No hay sistema de reporte, bloqueo de jugadores. El matchmaking ha EMPEORADO drasticamente. Consejo: Esperar a que salga de early access como minimo o jugarlo en caso de que se vuelva F2P o gratis por un fin de semana.

UPDATE 24/09/2025 - Season 1 

Los servidores funcionan de la forma esperada sin necesidad de programas de terceros para enrutar. El matchmaking parece ser mucho mas justo, pero sigue necesitando ajustes. 

Dicho esto, la playerbase (la poca que aun queda, al menos segun los numeros de PC) se encuentra dividida entre aquellos que disfrutamos las "mecanicas" (para otros exploits) y la velocidad que tenia el juego previa a todos los parches, la cual ha desaparecido totalmente. Practicamente es imposible (al menos en lobbys elite) regatear a una persona sin usar alguno de los considerados bugs o errores del juego (ippy slide, giros de camara bruscos, etc) lo cual ya deberia marcar el indicio de que hay ajustes necesarios para los regates por defecto (No esperamos que se pueda gambetear a todo un equipo, pero si seria logico no tener que recurrir a "tecnicas avanzadas" para pasar a una sola persona)

Ahora a los mas importante (y lamentablemente negativo). El sync del juego sigue siendo muy malo, muchas interacciones siguen fallando (Desconozco si dependen del servidor, del ping de cada persona, de como chocan ciertas habilidades, etc) pero la realidad es que el juego falla muchisimo a la hora de entregar intercepciones y acciones fluidas. Los tackles (sobre todo cuando se dan contra personas que usan las "mecanicas avanzadas" se resuelven de forma totalmente al azar: ves la animación del challenge, escuchas el hint de audio que indica que hiciste contacto con la pelota >>> no importa, la pelota se teletransporta al jugador que la llevaba antes, el cual ahora esta 2 metros de distancia adelante tuyo. Este es solo uno de los tantos ejemplos. esto genera que el juego no pueda ser tomado en serio ya que varias de las situaciones parecen depender mas de la suerte, red, servidor, etc antes que de la habilidad del propio jugador.

This game has the potential to be one of the best online multiplayer games out there. It reminds me of the early days of Rocket League. 

Gameplay is easy to learn, but hard to master. It's deceptively deep and incredibly satisfying to pull off good plays. 

This, more than anything, feels like the closest experience to actually playing a sport. Teamwork matters. Skill matters. There are no leveling mechanics to unbalance the playing the field. 

The only criticism I have at the moment is regarding the general lack of polish that is inevitable in the early stages of a competitive online game from a small studio. They've still got a lot of work to make the servers and netcode more stable, as well as balance some gameplay mechanics.

EN:
The game is still in beta, so if you're thinking about buying it, I'd suggest holding off. Animations are buggy, many parts of the game are glitchy, menus have visual errors, the store feels empty, and the rank system is terrible. You can jump three ranks at once, but to climb a division, it forces you into three more matches. It feels like they couldn’t be bothered to implement a proper Elo system, so they made ranking up artificially hard. Your in-game performance doesn’t matter—Elo points are added or subtracted at a fixed rate, with no performance-based rewards or losses. There’s also no reporting system, so trolling is rampant.

Only buy it if you’re okay with a work-in-progress game. Waiting for improvements is probably smarter than throwing your money away now.

Animasyonlar buglı, oyunun bir çok yeri buglı, menülerde görsel hatalar mevcut, mağaza vesaire boş, rank sistemi çok kötü, 3 rank atlıyorsunuz, division atlamak için tekrardan sizi 3 maça sokuyor, sırf üşenip rank getirmemek için, elo sistemini ayarlayamadıkları için rank atlamayı zorlaştırmışlar. Ayrıca maçta nasıl oynadığınızın önemi yok, sürekli belli bir elo puanı ekleniyor veya eksiliyor. Performansa dayalı elo puanı kazanma/kaybetme yok, ayrıca raporlama sistemi de olmadığı için bu sebeple insanlar çok daha rahat trolleyebiliyor.

Недолгие матчи по 6 минут (порой по 10 если команды равны) не позволяют устать, соперничество с противником и командная игра с тимой приносят удовольствие которого я давно не ощущал.
Но вот поддержка игры командой разработчиков откровенно говоря [u]ДЕРЬМО[/u].
[list]
 [*]Не лучшее состояние серверов, для нас, кто не живёт рядом с ними, порой бывает слишком заметно.
 [*]Либо из-за простого преимущества того кто имеет пинг меньше (слишком заметно даже на пинге 90-100, не говоря уже о большем), либо из-за лагов самого сервака с плохой регистрацией взаимодействия с мячом (так как тикрейт и пропускные способности серверов мягко говоря сомнительные).
 [*]Невозможно замъютить в войсе конкретного игрока, либо всю команду либо никого, а это значит что войсам не пользуются [u]ВСЕ[/u]!
 [*]Невозможно запретить кому-то спать эмоциями.
 [*]Отсутствует текстовый чат (хотя это понять можно, времени писать что либо у вас нет).
 [*]Почти ничего не пишут в чейнджлогах. Зато выходит куча колаб со спорт. брендами и футболистам.
[/list]
Игру рекомендую, но покупайте только самое дешёвое издание и никакого БП. Они пока не заслуживают денег больше.

Самый отвратительный неткод который когда либо видел за 20 лет онлайн игр. По началу вы кайфуете от игры, но потом в процессе обучения единалы-эгоисты начинают бесить, после принятия этого факты вас добивает второй, а именно "КАК ОН ЗАБРАЛ МЯЧ ЕСЛИ Я ДАЖЕ ПО ЗВУКУ ЕГО ВЗЯЛ/УДАРИЛ", ответ прост в игре за ~1.5к рублей и уже 3-4 месяца с момента беты не починили нет код, но зато добавили целых 4 наборчика донатных. Вердикт - если вы на валерьянке и пробыли в тибетском монашестве лет 10-15, то можете играть, если нет потеряете пару-тройку миллионов нейрончиков в мозгу...
А так пример как будут выглядит 8/10 ваших игр:
Начало, скриптованный пасс на вратаря, который выбегает из ворот и решает как он представил в своей голове обойти 1-2-3 и забить самый лучший мяч в мире которое не видало человечество, но проигрывает 
любому рандому 1х1 и вы получаете заведомое 1-0, следующий розыгрыш он спамит чтобы на него пассанули, но вы уже скептически относитесь к этому человеку и отдаете на 2-ого тиммейта он пробивает/дриблит что угодно делает но зачастую не дает пасс "лучшему игроку" и проигрывает мяч вы остаетесь 1 в 2-3-4 на воротах и слышите и видите как взяли сейв, но на самом деле неткод посчитал что вы еще прошлые 2 катки не отыграли и вас вообще нет в игре и получаете заведомые 2-0, после которых "вратарь 1х1" спамит отлично-отлично-отлично и либо в следующем розыгрыше отдает моментально мяч опять пойдя 1х1 или просто начинает забивать себе или что уж лучше то ливнет.
Очень неприятное управление пассами на клавиатуре и мыше, этому нужно прям учиться, ибо любой шорох и мяч уходит абсолютно в другое место.
Игра на вратаре не реально душная, есть сильные игроки на воротах, но зачастую если вам это не нравится, вы не сможете на них продуктивно отстоять свое время ибо, неткод постарается, да и банально предугадать и успеть на удар сложно, а в ситуациях где больше 1 игрока вообще в мизер улетает.
Из положительного:
Круто играть с реально умными людьми, повторюсь не со скилловичками/задротами которые в тренировке 70% времени в игре просидели, а просто с людьми видящими площадку и различные опции действий, но к сожалению таких будет пару человек матчей на 15.
Визуал у игры приятный, динамика и эффекты приятные, музыкальное сопровождение тоже не напрягает, даже после 3-4 часов.
Но все плюсы которые есть в игре задушит даже не токсики-единалы-эгоисты, а простой НЕТКОД.

upd. За почти 5 часовой сеанс игры, не было ни 1 катки про которую можно было бы сказать что она "хороша", даже не отлично, а просто хорошо. Либо вы проигрываете 1-3/4/5, либо сухая победа против новичков/ливеров и т.п., либо игра с задротами которые зачастую не используют тебя как опцию и играют соло в итоге чтобы найти реально хорошую игру где будут просто с тобой 5 приятных игроков, без ливов единальства, токсичности, фида почти анрил, так что если хотите получать удовольствие, играйте с друзьями только.

The most disgusting netcode I've ever seen in 20 years of online gaming. At first, you're enjoying the game, but then, as you learn more, the selfish players start to annoy you. After accepting this fact, the second one, "How did he get the ball if I even took/hit it by sound," becomes even more frustrating. The answer is simple: for a game that costs around 1,500 rubles and has been out for 3-4 months since the beta, they haven't fixed the code, but they have added four different sets of донатных предметов. The verdict is that if you're on valerian and have been a Tibetan monk for 10-15 years, you can play, but if not, you'll lose a couple of million neurons in your brain...
Here's an example of how 8/10 of your games will look like:
Start, a scripted pass to the goalkeeper, who runs out of the gate and decides how he imagined in his head to bypass 1-2-3 and score the best ball in the world that humanity has ever seen, but he loses 
any random 1v1 and you get a known 1-0, the next time he spams to get passed, but you're already skeptical about this person and give it to the 2nd teammate, he punches/dribbles whatever he does, but often does not give a pass to the "best player" and loses the ball. you stay 1 in 2-3-4 on goal and hear and see how you made a save, but in fact the netcode considered that you had not played the last 2 rinks and you are not in the game at all and you get a deliberate 2-0, after which the "1x1 goalkeeper" spams perfectly, perfectly, perfectly and either in the next draw he immediately gives the ball back by going 1x1 again or just starts scoring himself or better yet, it rains.
Very unpleasant control of passes on the keyboard and mouse, you need to learn this, because any rustle and the ball goes to a completely different place.
The game on the goalkeeper is not really stuffy, there are strong players on the goal, but often if you don't like it, you won't be able to defend your time productively because the netcode will try, and it's difficult to predict and catch the ball, and in situations where there are more than 1 player, it's even more difficult.
On the positive side:
It's great to play with really smart people, I'll repeat, not with the skill-levelers/nerds who spent 70% of their training time in the game, but simply with people who can see the court and various action options. Unfortunately, there will only be a couple of people in the 15 matches.
The game's visuals are pleasant, the dynamics and effects are enjoyable, and the music doesn't bother even after 3-4 hours.
However, the game's advantages are overshadowed by the presence of toxic, single-minded, aIt's just a netcode.

Season 1 更新

個人覺得與其推出3VS3的Rank模式，
還不如好好把Solo queue的機制做好，
無端分散原本就不多的玩家實在不是明智之舉。

總之遊戲還是好玩的，
只是要處理的問題堆積如山，
而官方似乎看不見重點所在；
雖然不知道官方看不看得到，
但還是想在這邊給幾個建議：
一、把單排機制改善，有溝通會讓這遊戲變得簡單沒錯，但像我一樣喜歡自己一個人安靜玩的，遊戲體驗就很不佳，希望至少Rank可以加個單排只會遇到單排玩家的系統，至少起跑點是一樣的。
二、目前遊玩人數前幾名的對戰型遊戲，應該都是免費遊玩的居多，原本就不好上手的遊戲，遊玩玩家基數不多的話留下來的人只會愈來愈少，更何況目前似乎沒有新手保護機制，等於新手陷入買遊戲→新手教學→玩兩三場都遇到鑽石、大師→沒遊戲體驗→退坑退費。

以上建議，希望這遊戲可以活下來。
Peace out.

(google translated)
Season 1 Update

Personally, I think that instead of launching a 3vs3 ranked mode,
it would be better to improve the Solo queue mechanics.
It's really unwise to unnecessarily split the already small player base.

All in all, the game is still fun,
but there are a mountain of issues that need to be addressed,
and the official team seems to be missing the point.
While I don't know if the official team sees this,
I still want to offer a few suggestions:

1. Improve the solo queue mechanics. While communication will certainly make the game easier, for people like me who prefer to play alone and in peace, the gaming experience is quite poor. I hope that at least Ranked can add a system where players will only play solo, so that the starting point is the same.

2. Currently, most of the most played competitive games are probably free-to-play. Games that are already difficult to get into, with a small player base, will only see fewer and fewer players stick around. Furthermore, there seems to be no new player protection mechanism, which means new players are stuck in a cycle of buying the game, getting tutorials, playing two or three games and only getting Diamond or Master, then having no experience, and then quitting and getting a refund.

With the above suggestions, I hope this game can survive.
Peace out.

Всем привет.
Наиграно на момент обзора 75 часов. 

Честно говоря, эта игра как глоток свежего воздуха среди спортивных симуляторов. Последний раз я покупал FIFA от EA лет 6-7 назад и был крайне разочарован, поскольку кроме изменений составов и форм команд толком ничего не менялось в глобальном смысле год за годом, и это за полный ценник.

Тут же небольшая студия создает инди игру, которая захватывает свое внимание простотой, за которой скрываются все сложности комбинаций и управления мячом. Особое внимание стоит уделить тому, что тут каждый управляет своим игроком в режимах 5х5, 4х4, 3х3. 

+
1. Динамичная игра, основное время которой закладывается в 5 минут. Есть овертайм, который, судя по всему, может длиться бесконечно. Я доходил до 9 минут наигранного времени в овертайме поверх основного времени.
2. Зрелище. Голы на любой вкус. 
3. Интересное управление. При нем важно заранее предугадывать действия соперника и отскок мяча. Вы чувствуете своего игрока.
4. Раскраски. Не могу сказать, что большая, но достаточно приличная база кастомизации и бесплатных раскрасок.
5. Поиск игры происходит достаточно быстро, в районе 1-2 минут.  Максимум времени, что я ждал, составлял 5 минут, и это было, может, раз 6-7 за все 75 наигранных часов.
-
1. Тиммейты. Я играю, как правило, дуо. Могу сказать, что попадается крайне большой поток неадекватной ребятни и стаков из пачек такой ребятни, которые всю игру будут пинать мячик между собой или водиться, будучи последними защитниками. Некоторые всю игру стоят впереди и просто ждут, пока им пнут мячик. Как мне тут заявил один на мой вопрос, почему бы не помочь команде, когда команде непросто обороняться,  мол, "он нападающий". Ну как бы понятно. И ладно если бы эти воробушки реализовывали хотя бы часть моментов. Но будьте уверены, что они транжирят 7 из 10 голевых передач.
2. Система наказаний: ее нет. За флейм без причин, за тот же отказ играть с командой, за голы в свои ворота в рейтинговых играх и умышленные выходы посреди игры нет никакой системы наказаний.
3-4. Рассинхрон сети. Иногда выкидывает из игры с повторным подключением, или вы ловите жуткие фризы непонятно с чего.
3-4. Баги. Вы посреди игры спокойно можете получить баг. Например, у меня часто случается такое, что я могу бить только по мячу, но при этом не могу его вести. Персонаж становится наполовину привидением, поскольку вас пройдет даже самый новичок и вы не сможете ему ничего противопоставить. К важным ошибкам хочется отнести баг получения ачивок. Я столкнулся с такой проблемой (как выяснилось, не только я), что невозможно получить достижение "От ворот до ворот" (Post to post). Я такой игрок, что больше раздаю голевых пасов, которых давным давно перевалило за отметку 200 (а это, на минуточку, сейчас одна из самых редких ачивок, поскольку игроки больше любят забивать, а не пасовать..."+100 голевых пасов"). Казалось бы, что уже давно ее должен был выполнить, но нет. Она просто не засчитывается. По условиям ачивки вы должны, будучи вратарем, дать голевой пас от ворот.  0 эффекта. Пытался сделать и в рангах, и в разных режимах - ни фига.
5. Рейтинговая система. Крайне слабый подбор игроков. Поскольку многие играют командами, иногда тебе подкидывает людей в стаке, часть из которых как будто впервые в игру зашли. Это ненормально.  Или вы получите рандомных ребят на своем рейтинге, которые пас на 2 метра не могут отдать или мяч пробелом принять.

Из предложений. Не знаю, читают ли их разработчики. Но все же напишу и заранее благодарю вас за этот интересный спортивный проект в геймдеве. 

1) Системы турниров, помимо рейтинговых игр, для режимов 3х3, 4х4, 5х5
2-3) Прозрачная мотивация для игроков, соблюдающих свою позицию. Чтобы на поле был меньше хаоса и люди не бегали тупо в 5 м в атаку, так будет резон получить больше награды.
2-3) Система мотиваций и поощрений. Начал в пункте 2, продолжу в 3. Хотелось бы больше наград, званий и раскрасок, как бы это ни звучало. Чтобы люди, играя, имели понимание и стремление к чему-то. Я, например, сильно расстроился, что, отдав почти 200 голевых пасов, нигде не увидел баннера, связанного с плеймейкером или чем-то подобным. 
4) Вы знаете, было бы неплохо со временем получить расширение игры с привязкой к позициям в новых режимах 7x7, 9x9, и 11x11 (с возможным вводом игры за судьи, начиная с режима 7x7). Это было бы очень интересно, поменялся бы геймплей, отношение к подкатам, добавились бы фолы. 
5) Разнообразие базы ведения и управления мячом для каждой роли. Большая часть игроков просто делает "рабону", спамя кнопку 24/7 и все. Ну вы понимаете, что это такое себе.
6) Выделю его капсом, поскольку считаю его очень важным. СДЕЛАТЬ ДИНАМИЧЕСКИ МЕНЯЮЩИЕСЯ СТЕНЫ ЗА ВОРОТАМИ. ИГРОКИ ОЧЕНЬ ЧАСТО ПОЛЬЗУЮТСЯ ОТСКОКОМ ОТ СТЕНЫ. ЕСЛИ БЫ ОНИ МЕНЯЛИСЬ НА ПРОТЯЖЕНИИ ИГРЫ И СТАНОВИЛИСЬ ОКРУГЛЕННЫМИ ВРЕМЯ ОТ ВРЕМЕНИ, ИГРА БЫ ИМЕЛА БОЛЬШИЙ ЭФФЕКТ НЕПРЕДСКАЗУЕМОСТИ В ОТСКОКЕ МЯЧА.

“Rematch—folks, it’s a tremendous game. Incredible. You get on with your friends, you play a few matches, and suddenly you're in the most competitive, most intense situation since the 2020 election. Total team game. You can't win without coordination. And believe me—we had perfect chemistry. The best.”

“Let’s talk players. Absolute legends.”

“BritishBeef—what a genius. Uses what we call the lag out technique. It’s brilliant. He runs into the corner in a straight line, like he’s completely disconnected from the internet. Just walking into the wall like Joe Biden at a press conference. The defenders see it, they think, ‘Oh no, he’s lagged out, let’s go press.’ Huge mistake. HUGE. Because just when they close in—BAM—he crosses it right into the box. Precision pass. Chaos everywhere. It’s psychological warfare, folks. I love it.”

“Kellmondo—now this guy, he doesn’t play games. He ends them. The blade shot he’s got? I’ve seen missiles with less impact. Slices straight through the defense. Very unfair. Very deadly. Frankly, a national treasure.”

“Throat Goat Mecci—they say he’s not flashy, but he doesn’t need to be. He’s consistent. Reliable. Like my golf swing—just perfect every time. He’s the keeper, folks. Nothing gets past him. Solid as the border wall—before Biden let people walk around it.”

“Omnibussy—unreal talent. The way he curves the ball into the corners? You’d think the ball was remote-controlled. It’s bending, spinning, gliding. Like watching a Tesla in autopilot. Beautiful football. The guy is dangerous from anywhere.”

“And of course, the backbone of our defense—LeethalJ. The GOAT. Nobody’s getting past him. He shuts it down like we shut down TikTok—completely. They try to dribble, he’s there. They shoot, he blocks it. They breathe, he reads it. I’d put him in charge of airport security—nobody would get through.”

“So look—Rematch? It’s competitive. It’s intense. But with the right team, with winners—it’s maybe the most fun you’ll ever have. Tremendous game. 10 out of 10. Would build a stadium for it. Believe me.”

There's a really good game in here, but the netcode can't handle what's going on almost every match. 

It really shouldn't have launched with as many showstopping bugs as it did:
-Sometimes you will not be able to possess the ball at all. Requires closing the game.
-Frequent crashes post game.
-Unintended dribble mechanics that completely desync in multiplayer matches, causing the ball to appear to warp around.
-No way to toggle voice during the actual match.
-"Priority" system will regularly leave you baffled at who comes up with the ball when two or more players are remotely close.
-Goalkeeping may as well be rolling a D20 with the way the priority system works. Sometimes you will be a god, the next match you might as well not have a collision shape. 

Ranked mode is maybe the most minimum viable product possible. Ranked matches will have you play solo vs 5 stacks, and seemingly doesn't actually take rank into effect when creating teams at all. You can also hit Elite with a sub 50% winrate, it's a complete joke. 

Game is plagued with a community that gives up the second something goes wrong. There is no path to punishment for people who quit ranked matches, own goal on purpose, racists in chat, etc. Zero development time spent here is a huge lack of foresight from the developer.

And there's hackers now too.

game has been out almost a month and the only things they added since beta are skins, no fixes, netcode is still ass, players and ball constantly teleporting, im pretty sure theres no rank based matchmaking either because the skill gap in games is wild and theres no way to check what rank your teammates or anyone is, and you always get the same amount of points in ranked, 20+ 20-, doesnt matter how good or bad you do in a game, rough for a game that has 1 gamemode you would think ranked would be atleast a little fleshed out. save your 24,99 for a large pepperoni pizza with fries and a diet coke

The Interpolation of the game is just really bad. You can observe how a ball just glitches from player to player or just applies random physics depending on the internet connection. Its like every player sees what they see instead that the server decides what you see. There are many bugs to fix and the RP Point system is way too simple: Win gain 20 / Defeat lose 16-17. Thats it - your performance, points, MVP or Overtime Struggle will not be counted in your gain of RP points which is in my opinion outrageous when you are always top-scoring but due to trollers, leavers or just bad players you are completely dragged down.

Ah yes and when we come to players: Its getting insanely toxic. As you progress more the more toxic people get, make a simple mistake anyone can happen suddenly they just spam you "Good Job" (in an ironic sense) and won't play with you anymore - like literally they wont pass or give you any opportunity anymore and just ragebait by spam-emoting you. Theres also these kind of players (encountered like 4 times) which just sabotage the game by scoring own goals on purpose. 

The Game itself can be fun with friends but the player base (so far) makes it hard to enjoy and its honestly getting worse since the playerbase is in decline and the toxic people mostly stay.

EDIT: Now apparently you can just kick out the ball from the keepers hands. The bugs keep rising and the devs "update" is just disappointing. They are extremely slow and even with their financial success they still don't get external help. Save your money.

although rematch is a lot of fun in the beginning, the game quickly gets stale and repetitive. this is mainly due to the limited options of playmaking and shooting, as well as the goalkeeper easily glueing to the ball, making most direct shots a wasted effort. 

on top of this the dev team has not added any content nor fixed any meaningful bugs since the beta. instead, they focus themselves on adding meaningless bundles of irl players because they want money.

ranked does not feel rewarding at all and does not compensate you for winning or losing with a teammate less. after winning a hard fought match, you queue into the next one where someone leaves straight away and all your RP from the previous game will be gone like the wind. 

the result is this game feels like it's still in early access. it has a lot of potential, but at this point in time it just feels boring after a while. every match starts to feel the same because you are locked to certain game mechanics, and there is nothing to push you to play more.

Ужасный конект. Постоянные потери пакета, телепортируются игроки, телепорты мяча и тд. Ситуаций когда мяч летит в тебя, ты его ловишь на воротах но засчитывается гол - просто каждую игру встречаются. Куча людей которые играют чисто как соло игроки и паса от них просто недождешься. Игра хорошая но технические проблемы портят всё впечатление от игры. Если поправят игру - будет круто но всегда есть вероятность что эти проблемы так и останутся, игроки уйдут и игра загнется.

На момент 15 Сентября - всё стало ещё хуже, не смотря на то что включили кроссплатформенные игры - проблема ливеров никуда не делась,матчмейкинг всё ещё крайне плох и порой когда стартуешь игру 3х3 - прямо видно на моменте когда игроки выходят что игра не может найти ещё 1-2 оппонентов. Incredibly fun game !!! If you like Rocket League - You will definitely like this game as well !!!

Overall the game is super fun. Some networking issues causes random ping spikes, server disconnections, and huge amounts of rubber banding. If you can look past that, or even better, if the servers can be upgraded accordingly, this game has insane potential. The skill floor is not too high, while the ceiling for peak is huge. Teamplay feels insanely rewarding and having a 5stack beats out 5 random players doing their own thing, as it should. Character creation is overall fun, but most games have the same 3-4 model bases and haircuts, alongside the obligatory Bachira clone that will never pass the ball.

Honestly, I have 100 hours in the game already and it has been incredibly fun. Server issues are ROUGH sometimes, but I assume this will get better over time as they upgrade servers to accommodate the unexpectedly large player base. Assume you will see 2+ blue lock character or name references per game, especially before hitting higher elo's of ranked.

Dear Rematch Development Team,

I would like to extend my appreciation for creating such an engaging and enjoyable game. I've had a great time playing Rematch, and I can clearly see the passion and effort your team has put into its development.

As a dedicated player, I wanted to share two suggestions that I believe could further enhance the overall gameplay experience:

In-Game Chat System – Implementing a communication feature that allows interaction between team members and between opposing teams could greatly improve coordination, strategy-building, and player engagement.

Cross-Platform Play – Enabling cross-play functionality between Steam and console players would significantly expand the player base, reduce matchmaking times, and foster a more vibrant and diverse community.

I'm confident that the future of Rematch is promising, and I’m excited to see how the game continues to evolve. Thank you again for your hard work and commitment to delivering a top-tier gaming experience.

Warm regards

C'est un super jeux, des mécaniques super intéressantes et un gameplay dynamique malgré la répétition CEPENDANT !

Le matchmatking est vraiment atroce, en solo Q le ratio de victoire est bas, je veux bien être maladroit parfois in-game mais après plus de 20 h ça devient frustrant de tomber sur des coéquipiers bêtes comme leurs pieds.

En général quand les parties sont équilibré ça se voit tout de suite, on à tous de la misère à faire des buts et la game est longue, il y'a un réel plaisir dans ce genre de difficulté. 
En ranked avec 5 joueurs forcés aléatoire je dirais que j'ai quasiment 3 chance sur 5 de tomber sur des joueurs tellement éclaté au sol que j'ai l'impression d'être vraiment bon à côtés.
Personne comprend comment se placer sur le terrain alors que suivre un joueur c'est vraiment pas compliqué.

Le jeu vient de sortir donc y'a pas mal de bug, parfois assez frustrant d'ailleurs, dans ton écran quand  tu arrête le ballon ben parfois le ballon passe quand même for some reason.

Je pense que y'a moyen d'être bon en spamant certaines touches et c'est pas vraiment une bonne chose, les enchaînements peuvent être vraiment cool comme vraiment chaotique.
(Les joueurs qui ragent quitte, mention spécial vous êtes vraiment des **** de la société.)

La ranked est vraiment fatiguante en solo, va falloir revoir le matchmaking et la manière dont vous quantifier les compétences des joueurs. Je pense que c'est un peu du grand n'importe quoi pour l'instant niveau ranked en solo.

Bref, je recommande c'est vraiment un bon jeux, mais attention RAGE BAIT à gogo x)

Rematch uses the relatively unexplored viewpoint of controlling a single player on a team very well. Pulling from their experience as fighting game devs, Sloclap gives players the tools to attack, defend, pass, and block whatever their opponent may try.  I think they did a wonderful job of distilling the players toolset, down to essential moves which can effectively help you deal with any situation. I am genuinely immersed in my matches while playing because of the nuance and depth, while still feeling like the game is light and approachable.

PASSING
1. Passing around to teammates and pulling your opponents defense apart by moving the ball around is incredibly rewarding and fun.  It's very obvious that Sloclap put a lot of time into crafting the passing system, because it shines so brightly within a game that is already glowing from the polish on every core concept. If you receive the ball and are pressured by a defender you have many passing tools at your disposal. Short, medium, and long passes can be sent as a lob or along the ground. This allows for some nice mental gaming between defender and ball carrier (e.g. try to make a read to intercept a fast ground pass or a lob pass over the defense). Shots also allow for long boots down the field, to pass to an open teammate who might be cherry picking for an easier 1-on-1.

SHOOTING
2. The ball shooting mechanic is simply fun to use.  Shooting the ball is at once, intuitive and deep. Even though it is simple to pick up, it will still take some time to understand the shooting mechanic's true versatility. Knowing how to combine power and curve to take the best shot from any position will take some time, but even as goalie I can respect a nasty shot that pulled me out of position. I've already had some disgusting slow curves break my ankles, and I have done the same to opposing goalies. Using the shooting mechanic to send a ball halfway down field and curving it so that only your teammate has an angle to receive it feels glorious! Even more-so when that buttery pass leads into a smooth goal that slips past the keeper.

DRIBBLING
3. Dribbling in this game is divisive I think. On the one hand, you are given a lot of tools to deal with a defenseman's onslaught, which is amazing when you don't have a quick pass, or easy shot. Being able to save the ball in a scramble and shoot or pass it out successfully is very engaging and fun. However, I feel like most of the community will agree with me when I say, the rainbow flick has made too many people feel overconfident in situations where passing is clearly the best option. I don't remember if it's in the full game's tutorial, but in the demo, you are explicitly taught to use the rainbow flick as a tool to move past opposing defenders. The rainbow flick in and of itself isn't a problem, but the way it is implemented and tutorialized has led parts of the community to embrace a playstyle that I believe is incongruous with the rest of the game's design philosophy. Too often, I see teammates get tackled, or have the ball stolen, when they try to just rainbow flick over the defender. I think it is important for SloClap to give player expression an outlet, but I feel like this might be a tool that needs some reworking. Whether in how the community is tutorialized on rainbow flick's use cases, or in how it is implemented in the game (change player inputs, change rainbow flick values, etc.), I think it would be smart to address this issue.

MONETIZATION
4. This game is $40 and it's monetization scheme is visible trash that should be more offensive than is currently received by fans. There are three big reasons no one talks about this garbage though. I) We've been inundated with this ♥♥♥♥ for years and one more season pass on the pile of crap isn't going to capture the hivemind's rage or attention. II) This stupid ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ game is actually a lot of fun to play in-spite of the trash marketplace that has been shunted onto it. III) The paid microtransactions are not attractive and do not make me want to buy the season pass. If I were playing with people decked out like Power Rangers or whatever, I might get some fomo. As is, though, the brand and name deals seem more "realistic", and honestly I could care less what kind of hoodie my character is wearing. I am also ignoring the fact that this game had a pay-walled launch! The saving grace of this game is that it, in fact, is a phenomenal experience to play, in spite of it's otherwise spartan offerings

All in all a really good game, pretty hard to learn but once you get the basic it is actually really fun. I cant stop playing it! And im sure the game only will get better and better. Things i would focus on fixing or adding to the game are the following:

* Right now you can just pass the ball back to the goalkeeper, which in some matches ends up with people timewasting, or in general just really op that your in a pressed situation you just pass it back and i takes it up. I would 110% mean you should change it to, ONLY when the ball comes of and opponent or a rebound. That would make it a lot more fair!
* I think in some situations its a bit to much focus 110% manual, you have to do all yourself 100% right. A little not much, but a little assist would help new players and people who already play the game. Like add a little aim assist and a little easier to do things like passing. but again only a minor buff would be great!
* REPORT! currently there is no report for reporting people who troll, or talk ♥♥♥♥ or something else. I had a few ranked games where people score own goals or mic spam or talk whit... would be nice with a report system.
* Add more then just 5 v 5 ranked. add 3 v 3 and 4 v 4 ranked. so incase you either play with one friend or 2 or more friends you dont have to play with that many randoms who doesnt talk or might troll or whatever it is.
* ADD CROSS-PLAY! (i know they wanted to add it to launch, so i hope they add it really soon!)

thoses are things i would change, but all in all a really fun game! Hard to learn but really rewarding once you do. I give it around a 7.5. would give it higher but the things listed pulls down a bit, but 7.5 is solid for a game who hasent been out long!

Outro excelente jogo para jogar com amigos! Pra mim o melhor jogo de futebol que já fizeram até agora! Os controles são um pouco mais complicados do que um FIFA ou PES, mas nada que um tempo no campo de treinamento pra saber jogar. Logicamente o jogo é arcade, não tem falta, lateral, tiro de meta etc (apesar que espero que eles coloquem futuramente em algum modo) e isso não atrapalha, pelo contrario, como é algo mais casual, arcade, você se diverte mais. Os graficos são bons tambem, nada a reclamar. Unico ponto negativo meu é algumas mecanicas quebradas, que podem ser resolvidas no futuro, como o pessoal que aprendeu que pular é mais rapido que correr, quando chutam na parede pra dar rebote para chutar pro gol e muitos carrinhos injuntos (mas como disse, isso pode ser resolvido com novos modos de jogo). E o último e que o game está muito ''seco'' ainda, só tem praticamente 1 modo, jogo casual ou competitivo e só, o passe da temporada não tem nada de legal, tem poucas opções para edicão de jogadores e uniforme, podem colocar uma edição de time no futuro por exemplo. AH, e o jogo ainda não tem um botão para denuncia, infelizmente você pode falar e ouvir quando fazer um gol, e o que tem de toxico nesse jogo não ta escrito, por isso recomendo só jogar com amigos e com o audio de grupo desligado. No mais, eu recomendo em uma promo, por R$60, R$70, não mais que isso, e espero que adicionem mais conteudo no futuro, porque se não não vai ter muitas horas de jogo para prender não.

As partidas, tanto no casual quanto no modo ranqueado são completamente frustrantes. A cada 10 partidas, venço 1, e tudo por culpa dos goleiros imb3c1s que ficam saindo da área do gol pra tocar a bola no meio do campo, acaba errando o passe e toma gol antes de conseguir correr de volta pra lá. Quando não é isso, aparece os caras achando que são o Denilson na copa de 2002 driblando todo mundo, não toca a bola e ainda erra o drible. Só compre se você for montar equipe com seus amigos em call, porque se for pra depender dessa cambada de inútil do matchmaking, você só vai passar raiva.

O jogo teve algumas atualizações e não mudou muita coisa. Lançou em junho, e até agora simplesmente parece que estou jogando uma versão beta. Do jeito que o jogo está, não seria melhor ter lançado em acesso antecipado até corrigir tudo que precisa com patches? Tá faltando tudo, literalmente TUDO pra ser um jogo completo. O jogo não tem sistema de punição pra nenhuma ação de troll como fazer gol contra de propósito a partida inteira, e, pior ainda, não tem como reportar essas pessoas. Diz que você vai ser punido ao sair no meio de uma partida mas não fica claro qual é essa punição, e as pessoas saem e não acontece nada (pelo menos pra mim não ficou claro até agora o que acontece já que o jogo não te dá o trabalho de explicar). Muitas vezes entro na partida e não consigo me mexer até que alguém faça um gol e todo mundo retorne pras suas respectivas posições, aí sim volta ao normal. A mecânica do goleiro é muito falha e não faz sentido maior parte do tempo. Muitas vezes o goleiro se joga pro mesmo lado e no timing correto, mas a bola passa por baixo do braço do dele (?????) Se continuar desse jeito, vai ser mais um jogo que terá os servidores desligados daqui há alguns meses. Inviável no preço cheio. Recomendo comprar só daqui há uns meses se realmente arrumarem tudo isso e no mínimo com 70% de promoção. Pagar quase 100 reais nesse jogo quebrado é um grande arrependimento meu.

Tempo de jogo no momento da análise: 42 Horas, e pretenco colocar muito mais nesse jogo.

📌 Visão Geral
Rematch é uma proposta ousada de futebol de rua arcade, claramente inspirada em títulos como FIFA Street, mas com uma pegada própria e centrada no multiplayer competitivo e cooperativo. Com modos 3x3, 4x4 e 5x5, o foco está no jogo rápido, criativo e coletivo — e é aqui que o jogo brilha.

✅ Pontos Positivos
Jogabilidade fluida e recompensadora: O sistema de passes, dribles e finalizações é bem implementado. Jogar em equipe e construir jogadas coletivas resulta em momentos genuinamente satisfatórios.

Experiência de linha viciante: A zona de maior destaque do jogo. Trocas rápidas, tabelas e jogadas improvisadas tornam cada partida única e divertida.

Estilo visual e identidade própria: Apesar de beber da fonte de FIFA Street, o jogo entrega um estilo próprio, com excelente ambientação urbana e ótima trilha sonora.

Boa evolução pós-lançamento: Desde o lançamento, a desenvolvedora tem mostrado compromisso em corrigir bugs e melhorar a experiência geral.

⚠️ Pontos a Melhorar
Gameplay de goleiro inconsistente: Ainda que divertida em muitos momentos, a mecânica de goleiro precisa de ajustes. Pulos frontais, por exemplo, falham com frequência dependendo do ângulo da bola, tornando defesas básicas impossíveis em alguns casos.

Ausência de regra de recuo: Atualmente é possível segurar a bola entre goleiro e zagueiro indefinidamente, sem penalização. Isso pode ser explorado para fazer cera e quebrar o ritmo das partidas, principalmente em jogos mais competitivos.

Sem crossplay no lançamento: Embora a Sloclap tenha comunicado com antecedência que o jogo não teria crossplay no lançamento, esse fator limitou o matchmaking em alguns momentos. A boa notícia é que o crossplay já está confirmado e, segundo a própria desenvolvedora, é atualmente a prioridade máxima de implementação.

Problemas técnicos no lançamento: Crashs e desyncs eram comuns inicialmente. No estado atual (14/07/2025), minha experiência tem sido estável, com problemas técnicos dificilmente ocorrendo, diria que uma a cada 40 partidas ocorrem problemas.

🧠 Considerações Finais
Apesar do lançamento conturbado, Rematch mostra enorme potencial. A base da jogabilidade é sólida, divertida e voltada para o jogo coletivo — algo que poucos títulos de futebol realmente valorizam hoje. Se a desenvolvedora continuar ouvindo a comunidade e atualizando o jogo com consistência (como tem feito), ele tem tudo para se tornar um dos grandes nomes do futebol arcade online.

🎯 Nota Final: 8/10 – Recomendado, Joguem!
Um dos jogos mais criativos e promissores do gênero. Com o crossplay chegando em breve e o suporte contínuo da desenvolvedora, Rematch pode atingir o mesmo patamar de relevância de títulos como Rocket League.

i want to give this game a glowing review. i want to tell everyone how refreshing and fun this game is. 
i had close to 80 hours in this game prior to the official release, just in the playtests + betas.
the issues with netcode, desync, animations breaking, stuttering when moving around other players, and general inconsistency are just too much right now.
add in that the servers seem to be in a total state of disarray; 2 out of 3 matches i join, i have 100+ ping in same-region servers.
i have high hopes for the long-term. i'm sure they made a huge chunk of money off the initial release, so hopefully quite a bit of that is reinvested into getting this game where it needs to be. 
i'd recommend checking it out around the end of the year to see if things have improved.

There just isn't enough content, there is quite literally nothing to do. There's 3 quick play game modes, which only differ with the amount players, and there's a single 5v5 competetive mode. Even though the game is completely unbalanced in 5v5, and the most optimal way to play it, is in 3v3. 
The absence of offsides kills the need for any tactics whatsoever, as the best tactic is to just sit in the opponent's box all the time, and have the rest of the team play longballs. There hasn't been a single update adding any new content since the game released, only new skins (in a paid game btw).

Stay away from it

S'il vous plaît mettez en place un vrai systeme de matchmaking, les niveaux sont beaucoup trop différents dans chaque partie et c'est vraiment frustrant. En diamant certaines personnes ont encore le niveau bronze (0 passe et aucun dribble réussi, pas d'arret, aucun tir cadré, défend jamais). C'est inadmissible, les games sont gagnées soit perdues d'avance selon les joueurs. Il n'y a aucune partie serré, c'est soit 4-0 soit 0-4. De plus il n'est pas normal qu'un joueur diamant par exemple puisse jouer en ranked avec un ami bronze. Tous les jeux compétitifs proposent une limite et ce n'est pas pour rien. Il faut aussi mettre en place un vrai systeme de reporting pour que les trollers soient punis. Certains joueurs prennent un but et arrête de jouer voir mettent des buts contre leur camp. Sinon le jeu est cool.

Pour le jeu  en lui-même je suis archi fan. Un rêve d'enfance. La gratification est très proche du vrai sport d'équipe. On est fier de réussir telle passe, tel arrêt, marquer un but bien sûr. On rate, assez souvent, ce qu'on avait en tête, ce qui est d'autant plus gratifiant lorsque l'on réussit. Et réussir en équipe décuple ces sentiments. Comme le foot. 
Rematch a ce petit truc rare de relancer une partie pour le jeu lui-même, pas pour débloquer des trucs, gagner des points ou que sais-je. On y joue pour jouer.

EDIT : Pour ce qui est de l'étât du jeu il y a de serieux soucis de contenu. En 1, le crossplay, qui met bien trop longtemps à être mis en place et est un énorme frein à son succès.
En 2, les défis proposés au joueur. Il n'y en a quasiment pas, on n'a pas d'objectifs personnels à se donner.
En 3, les fonctions sociales sont inexistantes. Dans une ITW, un dev a annoncé vouloir s'inspirer de ce qui existe dans les fantasy league ou le foot lui-même avec l'idée de pouvoir créer des clubs affiliés à une ville, un pays. C'est une super idée mais encore une fois, tout prend trop de temps à être incorporé.
Je continue à penser que le jeu mérite une note positive car son fond de gameplay reste excellent, mais je suis très dubitatif sur ce que le devs veulent faire et font vraiment.
Will change to positive after networking, bugs and competitive are fixed.
